title: Chocolate Fondant
excerpt: Ingredients 50 g -75% dark chocolate 50 g butter 1 egg 1 egg yolk 50 g castor sugar 2 tablespoons flour Method Melt the chocolate and butter in a glass bowl over a double boiler with water on your stove. Butter two cups and dust with cocoa powder. Place in the fridge. Whisk the …
html:
Ingredients

  • 50 g -75% dark chocolate
  • 50 g butter
  • 1 egg
  • 1 egg yolk
  • 50 g castor sugar
  • 2 tablespoons flour

Method

Melt the chocolate and butter in a glass bowl over a double boiler with water on your stove.

Butter two cups and dust with cocoa powder. Place in the fridge.

Whisk the egg, egg yolk and castor sugar until light in colour.

Whisk in the flour.

Fold in the chocolate mixture.

Divide between the two cups and bake at 200 ºC for 12 minutes.
